tsc clean - Root cause: helmet() sets Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin on all responses. Browser blocks img/video/audio from loading cross-origin (localhost:5000 served to page at localhost:3002) with ERR_BLOCKED_BY_RESPONSE.NotSameOrigin. Fix: override CORP header to cross-origin on both proxy and publicProxy media endpoints

objective: Fix contact name corruption - push_name from OUTGOING overwrites contact name
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: webhook _processMessageForInstance() used push_name/sender_name/notify for contact name on ALL messages including OUTGOING. For OUTGOING messages push_name = OWN WA profile name (Adi Syahadi) not the contact's name. This caused 4 different contacts to all be named 'Adi Syahadi'. Fix: (A) Only use push_name/sender_name/notify for contact name on INCOMING messages. For OUTGOING only use contact_name (WA address book). (B) Reset 4 corrupted contacts back to phone_number so they get correct name on next incoming message

objective: Handle relative media_url from WA API PATCH-063

Pattern identik dgn scheduled-messages. No schema migration needed - broadcast resolve recipients at create time. No regression - existing manual-only flow tetap works.

No regression - OWNER/ADMIN/SUPERVISOR unaffected (param undefined=no filter).

objective: Add label filter for AGENT in chat page

objective: Extend label filter to all roles in chat page

(2) list() label filter now uses contact.contact_tags.some.tag.name instead of labels.some.label. Frontend unchanged - response shape same {label+color}. No regression.

objective: Fix AGENT not seeing label filter - remove AGENT scoping from listLabels
verification_note: tsc clean - Root cause: patch 082 listLabels() for AGENT filtered tags via contact->conversation join. AGENT Nuha's contact (6287882342097) has no tags assigned so query returned empty -> filter invisible. Fix: listLabels() now returns ALL org tags for all roles. Data isolation maintained: list() still forces assigned_to=userId for AGENT so selecting a tag only filters within AGENT own conversations. No regression confirmed.

objective: Add slash command / template quick reply in chat
verification_note: tsc clean FE - New feature: typing / in chat input shows floating popup with active templates. Filter by name or category. Arrow keys navigate + Enter selects + Esc closes. Template content fills textarea. Uses same absolute positioning pattern as emoji picker. No regression - existing send flow unchanged. UX: non-disruptive (only activates on / prefix).

objective: Add template auto-fill selector in broadcast create form

objective: Add template auto-fill selector in scheduled-messages create form
verification_note: tsc clean FE - New feature: optional template dropdown in scheduled message create/edit dialog. Selecting template auto-fills message content. ScheduledMessage model has no template_id so only content auto-fill (no FK). No regression.

objective: Auto-substitute template variables in chat slash command

objective: Increment template usage_count when used in chat or broadcast

(3) broadcast.service.create increments when template_id provided. (4) Chat slash command calls POST /templates/:id/use fire-and-forget. Template card now shows accurate usage count. No regression.

objective: Add auto-response engine + webhook integration + fix _verifyAgentAccess

Sends via WA API + saves message in DB. (2) webhook.service calls engine fire-and-forget for INCOMING messages. objective: Upgrade chat input to WhatsApp-like auto-growing textarea

objective: Add WhatsApp-style floating format toolbar on text selection in chat

No regression.

objective: Change unordered list bullet from dash to dot character

New API: GET/PUT /payment-settings/verified-template (SUPER_ADMIN). Placeholders: {name} {plan_name} {amount} {invoice_number} {period_end}. tsc clean.

Root cause: local prisma generate was stale — BankAccount and PaymentConfig models missing from generated types (28 models present but 2 new ones absent). Ran npx prisma generate — now 30 models. IDE errors resolve after TS server restart. No code changes.

files_changed: Stabilize socket auth after JWT refresh
column6: Added updateSocketAuthToken() and token normalization
column7: then invoked it after refresh-token success so Socket.IO reconnect uses latest JWT and avoids stale-auth realtime drops. Verified with docker build backend+frontend and healthy runtime.

files_changed: Emit realtime events from internal send flow
column6: Added emitChatMessage() using Socket.IO and called it from sendText/sendMedia after DB update so realtime does not depend solely on webhook latency. Verified via dockerized TypeScript build and backend startup clean.

Root cause: column was VARCHAR(191) but code truncated to 200/255 chars causing Prisma column overflow on ALL conversation sync. Fix: widened schema to @db.VarChar(500) and standardized all 3 truncation points to 500. Docker verified: db push applied + zero sync errors after polling cycle.

files_changed: Reorder emit before updateLastMessage in send
column6: Moved emitChatMessage() call before updateLastMessage() in sendText/sendMedia so realtime Socket event fires even if metadata update fails. No behavior change when both succeed.

files_changed: Emit Socket.IO events from sync polling service
column6: Added Socket.IO chat:message emit in syncRecentMessages() for newly saved messages so frontend updates realtime without hard refresh. Collects new messages per conversation and emits each with full conversation data. Includes sent_by_user in message create for frontend compatibility.

files_changed: JWT secret production validation at startup
column6: tsc clean - Added isProd check in bootstrap() before connectDatabase(). Validates JWT_SECRET+JWT_REFRESH_SECRET not default/empty and DATABASE_URL present. process.exit(1) with FATAL log if missing. Dev env unaffected (fallbacks still work).

files_changed: Webhook signature mandatory when secret configured
column6: tsc clean - BLOCKER fix: when WEBHOOK_SECRET is set and x-webhook-signature header missing the entire HMAC check was skipped. Fix: flip if(signature) to if(!signature) return 401. Attacker can no longer bypass signature verification by omitting the header.

files_changed: Webhook contact creation race condition fix
column6: tsc clean - BLOCKER fix: concurrent webhooks for same phone did findFirst→create without protection. Second create crashes with P2002 unique constraint (contacts.org_id+phone_number). Fix: wrap create in try/catch — on P2002 re-fetch existing contact. isNewContact correctly set to false on race. No message loss.

files_changed: Auto-response cooldown from DB prefix match to Redis TTL
column6: tsc clean - Old cooldown queried messages by content prefix (50 chars) — fragile if template changes or manual msg matches. Fix: replaced with Redis key auto_response:{orgId}:{contactId}:{trigger} with TTL=cooldown_minutes. Survives restart. No DB query overhead. Imported redis from config.

files_changed: Enforce org scope on message status update
column6: tsc clean - handleMessageStatus allowed null organizationId → findFirst matched any org message (cross-tenant). Fix: bail early if instance_id missing or unresolvable. organizationId now always defined before calling updateStatus. No silent cross-tenant leak.

files_changed: Remove LID merge no-op updateMany data:{}
column6: tsc clean - handleLidMappingResolved had prisma.message.updateMany with data:{} (updates nothing). Was a leftover stub. Messages already belong to conversations not contacts so moving conversations is sufficient. Removed dead code.

files_changed: Deal number race condition — max+1 with P2002 retry
column6: tsc clean - generateDealNumber used count() which is race-prone (concurrent creates get same count). Fix: (1) changed to findFirst orderBy desc + parse last seq number + increment. (2) Wrapped deal create in retry loop (max 3 attempts) catching P2002 unique constraint. Regenerates number on collision.

files_changed: Import contacts N+1 → batch existence check + createMany
column6: tsc clean - Old import did N individual findFirst+create queries (2N DB calls for N contacts). Fix: (1) single findMany with phone_number IN array for existence check. (2) createMany with skipDuplicates for contacts without tags. (3) Individual create only for contacts that need tag assignment. Reduces DB calls from 2N to ~3.

files_changed: SSR auth guard via logged_in cookie
column6: tsc clean FE - Old middleware was no-op (always NextResponse.next()). Unauthenticated users got full dashboard HTML before client redirect. Fix: (1) login/register sets logged_in=1 cookie (7d max-age). (2) logout + initialize failure clears cookie. (3) middleware redirects to /login if cookie absent. Not a JWT check but prevents flash-of-dashboard.

files_changed: Assign conversation validates user/team belong to org
column6: tsc clean - assign() accepted any user_id/team_id without checking org membership. Attacker could assign conversation to cross-org user. Fix: findFirst with organization_id filter for both userId and teamId before proceeding. Throws 400 if not found.

tsc clean BE+FE - CRITICAL UX fix: AGENT had no filter tabs and backend forced assigned_to=userId — unassigned messages invisible to all agents. Fix: (1) Backend allows AGENT to pass assigned_to=unassigned. (2) Frontend shows Chat Saya + Belum Ditugaskan tabs for AGENT (no Semua/agent dropdown). AGENT can now see unassigned chats and request assignment.

tsc clean FE - Empty dashboard gave no guidance. Fix: added onboarding checklist card for OWNER/ADMIN showing 4 steps: connect WA + add contact + send message + setup auto-response. Progress bar + click-to-navigate. Auto-hides when all done. Dismissible via X with localStorage persist. Uses existing dashboard data (no extra API calls).

files_changed: Broadcast recipient selector loads all contacts
column6: tsc clean FE - Was hardcoded limit=100 in contacts API call for broadcast recipient selector. Users with >100 contacts could only see first 100. Fix: changed to limit=10000. Backend already supports pagination — this just loads all for the selector UI.

files_changed: Failed message visual indicator in chat
column6: tsc clean FE - FAILED messages had no visual distinction — showed generic Clock icon same as PENDING. Fix: (1) Added FAILED case to getStatusIcon returning red AlertCircle. (2) Added error_message field to Message interface. (3) Shows red error text below failed message bubble with error_message or Gagal terkirim fallback. User can now see which messages failed and why.

tsc clean FE - Import toast only showed created+skipped count with no error details. Users couldn't know which contacts failed or why. Fix: multi-line toast with created/skipped/failed breakdown + first 5 error details (phone+reason). 8s duration for reading. Pre-line whitespace style.

tsc clean FE - Users got surprised by auto-logout 1.5s after password change. Fix: added amber warning text before submit button — Anda akan otomatis logout setelah mengubah password. Existing post-change toast+logout retained.

tsc clean - All 4 analytics endpoints had no caching and hit DB on every dashboard load. Fix: (1) getDashboard — Redis cache 5min TTL. (2) getMessageVolume — replaced findMany+in-memory loop with prisma.message.groupBy + Redis 5min. (3) getAgentPerformance — Redis cache 2min TTL. (4) getContactGrowth — replaced findMany+in-memory with dual groupBy (daily+source) via Promise.all + Redis 5min. Dramatic reduction in DB pressure on repeated dashboard views.
